accessToken.label: Access Token
accessToken.description: Your TikTok Access Token. Please see TikTok’s [Events API 2.0 documentation](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1771101130925058) for information on how to generate an access token via the TikTok Ads Manager or API.

eventSetID.label: Event Set ID
eventSetID.description: Your TikTok Offline Event Set ID. Please see TikTok’s [Events API 2.0 documentation](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1771101027431425) for information on how to find this value.

trackPaymentOfflineConversion.title: [Deprecated] Track Payment Offline Conversion
trackPaymentOfflineConversion.description: [Deprecated] Send details of an in-store purchase or console purchase to the Tiktok Offline Events API. This Action has been Deprecated. Please use the 'Track Payment Offline Conversion' Action instead

event.label: Event Name
event.description: Conversion event name. Please refer to the "Offline Standard Events" section on in TikTok’s [Events API 2.0 documentation](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1771101186666498) for accepted event names.

event_id.label: Event ID
event_id.description: Any hashed ID that can identify a unique user/session.

timestamp.label: Event Timestamp
timestamp.description: Timestamp that the event took place, in ISO 8601 format.

phone_numbers.label: Phone Number
phone_numbers.description: A single phone number or array of phone numbers in E.164 standard format. At least one phone number value is required if both Email and External ID fields are empty.

email_addresses.label: Email
email_addresses.description: A single email address or an array of email addresses. At least one email value is required if both Phone Number and External ID fields are empty.

external_ids.label: External ID
external_ids.description: Uniquely identifies the user who triggered the conversion event. TikTok Offline Conversions Destination supports both string and string[] types for sending external ID(s). At least one external ID value is required if both Email and Phone Number fields are empty.

ttclid.label: TikTok Click ID
ttclid.description: The value of the ttclid used to match website visitor events with TikTok ads. The ttclid is valid for 7 days. See [Set up ttclid](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?rid=4eezrhr6lg4&id=1681728034437121) for details.

ttp.label: TikTok Cookie ID
ttp.description: TikTok Cookie ID. If you also use Pixel SDK and have enabled cookies, Pixel SDK automatically saves a unique identifier in the `_ttp` cookie. The value of `_ttp` is used to match website visitor events with TikTok ads. You can extract the value of `_ttp` and attach the value here. To learn more about the `ttp` parameter, refer to [Events API 2.0 - Send TikTok Cookie](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=%201771100936446977) (`_ttp`).

lead_id.label: TikTok Lead ID
lead_id.description: ID of TikTok leads. Every lead will have its own lead_id when exported from TikTok. This feature is in Beta. Please contact your TikTok representative to inquire regarding availability

locale.label: Locale
locale.description: The BCP 47 language identifier. For reference, refer to the [IETF BCP 47 standardized code](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/bcp/bcp47.txt).

url.label: Page URL
url.description: The page URL where the conversion event took place.

user_agent.label: User Agent
user_agent.description: User agent from the user’s device.

contents.label: Contents
contents.description: Related item details for the event.

brand.label: Brand
brand.description: Brand name of the product item.

content_type.label: Content Type
content_type.description: Type of the product item. When the `content_id` in the `Contents` field is specified as a `sku_id`, set this field to `product`. When the `content_id` in the `Contents` field is specified as an `item_group_id`, set this field to `product_group`.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency for the value specified as ISO 4217 code.

value.label: Value
value.description: Value of the order or items sold.

description.label: Description
description.description: A string description of the web event.

query.label: Query
query.description: The text string that was searched for.

limited_data_use.label: Limited Data Use
limited_data_use.description: Use this field to flag an event for limited data processing. TikTok will recognize this parameter as a request for limited data processing, and will limit its processing activities accordingly if the event shared occurred in an eligible location. To learn more about the Limited Data Use feature, refer to [Events API 2.0 - Limited Data Use](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1771101204435970).

test_event_code.label: Test Event Code
test_event_code.description: Use this field to specify that events should be test events rather than actual traffic. You can find your Test Event Code in your TikTok Events Manager under the "Test Event" tab. You'll want to remove your Test Event Code when sending real traffic through this integration.

trackNonPaymentOfflineConversion.title: [Deprecated] Track Non Payment Offline Conversion
trackNonPaymentOfflineConversion.description: [Deprecated] Send a non payment related event to the TikTok Offline Conversions API. This Action has been Deprecated. Please use the 'Track Payment Offline Conversion' Action instead

event.description: Conversion event name. Please refer to the "Offline Standard Events" section on in TikTok’s [Events API 2.0 documentation](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1771101186666498) for accepted event names.
